series_metadata.series_title: Findings for Recovery Quarterly Report Records received from the Attorney Generals Office
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to correspondence from the Ohio Attorney General indicating that the finding has been resolved and a request that the person/entity be removed from the findings for recovery database.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: electronic version has been created, or no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: from date quarterly report is received by Auditor of State
